title: truellum dichotomum
intro: Truellum dichotomum, also known as the Sichuan Lovage Tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of western China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and swelling, and treating gastrointestinal disorders. Truellum dichotomum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the form of dried roots and rhizomes, to harness its medicinal properties.
